attributes.action: Abolish Daylight Saving Time in the United Kingdom
attributes.additional_details:
Many people experience negative effects on their health, including sleep disturbances, fatigue, and reduced productivity. Scientific studies have shown that even a one-hour shift can impact mental and physical well-being.
In addition, the clock changes create confusion for businesses, transportation schedules, and international communication. In today’s modern, globally connected world, this outdated practice no longer serves a meaningful purpose.
attributes.background:
We, the undersigned, call on the UK Government to abolish the practice of changing the clocks twice a year.
The current system of switching between Greenwich Mean Time (GMT) and British Summer Time (BST) causes unnecessary disruption to daily life.

rejection.details:
You may be interested in this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Abolish seasonal clock changes & keep the UK on a fixed time all year-round
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765776
